mapper.select: /* VM_HR01A01_Dao_retrieveDeptInqire */ SELECT LEVEL AS LEV, OBJID, STEXT, REGDT, UPDDT, ZFCOD, STRDT, ENDDT, UPOBJ, DEPTH, SEQNO, PARTS, DIVI1, DIVI2, PERNR, KOSTL FROM HRM.VM_HR01A01 A CONNECT BY NOCYCLE PRIOR OBJID = UPOBJ AND SYSDATE BETWEEN STRDT AND ENDDT START WITH SEQNO = 1

/* VM_HR01A01_Dao_retrieveDept2Inqire */ SELECT OBJID, STEXT, REGDT, UPDDT, ZFCOD, STRDT, ENDDT, UPOBJ, DEPTH, SEQNO, PARTS, DIVI1, DIVI2, PERNR, KOSTL FROM HRM.VM_HR01A01 A WHERE OBJID IN ( SELECT OBJID FROM VC_HR01001 ) AND SYSDATE BETWEEN STRDT AND ENDDT
